case_title: COAST COUNTIES PROPERTY MANAGEMENT INC. VS. TODD MARTIN et al

docket_entries.description: ORIGINAL SUMMONS RETURNED. FILED BY PLAINTIFF COAST COUNTIES PROPERTY MANAGEMENT INC.
